summary:
Given an array of integers that may contain duplicate values, return all possible subsets (the power set).

The answer must not contain duplicate subsets: if two subsets contain the same multiset of values, only one should appear. The empty subset is included, and subsets can be returned in any order.

examples.explanation: Although there are two 2s, subsets like [2] are listed only once rather than twice.

constraints: The output must not include duplicate subsets
Subsets may be returned in any order
